_comment: ML training defaults. Tree trainers (Main_4 / scripts) and Main_6 PyTorch inlet→outlet NN read test_size, random_state, and neural_network.* from here. See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.

neural_network._comment: Used by notebooks/Main_6__train_evaluate_SimpleNN_IO.ipynb (defaults match notebook fallbacks if a key is omitted). Keys h1–h3 are three hidden-layer widths.

tuning._comment: Consumed by Main_6 Section 6b only when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True. timeout_seconds=null means no wallclock limit.
